title: Up to $20,000 in free compute credits - the only CI/CD platform capable of scaling with you without limits
description: AI startups are growing faster than any startups ever before. CircleCI is the only CI/CD platform capable of scaling with you, without limits, as you grow. Make the right decision now and get started with the best-in-class CI/CD.
eligibility: AWS Activate members who meet the offer's current provider, account, and regional requirements.
value: Up to $20,000 in free compute credits - the only CI/CD platform capable of scaling with you without limits
